items.title: Scared of the AI trade? Here are three investment themes instead, says Goldman Sachs
items.description: Semiconductors have fallen into a bear market, prompting some investors to look elsewhere

items.title: I will claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
items.description: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”

items.title: Why it’s time to retire the Magnificent Seven as a stock-market talking point, say these strategists
items.description: Magnificent Seven as a group is underperforming the broader market this year, but strategists at Citi argue it’s no longer a grouping that even makes sense to think about it.

items.title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
items.description: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

items.title: Is an opportunity to buy chip stocks nearing? These two big Wall Street banks are divided.
items.description: JPMorgan says a summer buying opportunity is coming for chip stocks, but Morgan Stanley says the sector is in for a hard remainder of 2026.

items.title: Inflation is broadening out, says Goldman economist

items.title: We have $8 million in traditional IRAs. Should we tap them to buy a house — and take the tax hit?
items.description: “We would rather pay taxes upfront than pay mortgage interest.”

items.title: If history is a guide, there’s still another week before earnings will start to move the stock market
items.description: The S&P 500 is primed to climb during the third, fourth and fifth weeks of the financial reporting period, according to Jefferies.

items.title: Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs sells $55 million Miami mansion he tried to use for bail

items.title: ‘Full House’ creator Jeff Franklin relists $45 million Beverly Hills home built on site of Manson murders
items.description: “Full House” creator Jeff Franklin is once again on the hunt for a buyer for his Beverly Hills mansion which has sinister ties to the Charles Manson murders.
